data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #5' aimed to confirm the behavior of cancellation with access until the period end. However, the evidence indicates that the plan upgrade did not permit additional credit grants to the wallet, which directly impacts the ability to validate the scenario as expected. This blockage is evidenced by the failure message stating 'Plan upgrade did not permit additional credit grant to the wallet.'
evidencePointers: uc-need-validate-5: Plan upgrade did not permit additional credit grant to the wallet.
gaps: The inability to grant additional credits prevents the validation of the cancellation scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
